name: Steamed Brown Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sifted flours, salt, and baking soda in a large container.
2. Add the sugar, molasses, and sour milk to the flour mixture.
3. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
4. Place the batter in a pail and cover tightly with plastic wrap.
5. Set the pail on a layer of boiling water.
6. Boil steadily for 2 1/2 hours. The bread can also be prepared in two smaller cans.
>From Favorite recipes of Colfax Country Club Women, 1946 by Daisy Diver, Raton.
Typed by Ethel Snyder
Date August 12, 1997
